---
title: "Joe's Website"
---

<!---
article entries will follow this format:
<article>
<h3><a href=""> </a></h3>
<div class="summary">
<span><i class="fa fa-calendar"></i> _date_</span>
<p> ...</p>
<a class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm" href="">Full Post</a>
</div>
</article>
--->

```{r echo=FALSE}
knitr::include_graphics("pixel_face.png", dpi=100)
```

<article>
<h3><a href="PAMS_and_SILHOUETTE_by_hand.html">Clustering: PAM k-Medoids, CLARA & Silhouette Values</a></h3>
<div class="summary">
<span><i class="fa fa-calendar"></i> _2019-12-01_</span>
<p>description text here</p>
<a class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm" href="PAMS_and_SILHOUETTE_by_hand.html" role="button">Full Post</a>
</div>
</article>

<article>
<h3><a href="constrOptim.html">Constrained Optimisation in R</a></h3>
<div class="summary">
<span><i class="fa fa-calendar"></i> _2019-02-08_</span>
<p>manual Optimisation in R with linear constraints using the constrOptim() function</p>
<a class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm" href="constrOptim.html" role="button">Full Post</a>
</div>
</article>
